review_scope.scope: Exhaustive docs-first re-review of the repaired proposal, design, tasks, delta specs, and verification-cycle reference contracts for OpenSpec change add-steering-tuning-media-observability, with focus on resolution of STM-ART-001 and STM-ART-002.

review_coverage.notes: Re-reviewed the full declared docs-first artifact set against Completeness, Correctness, and Coherence. STM-ART-001 is resolved by freezing the exact JSON header layout for `config_snapshot` and `image_frame`, including `param_snapshot`, `media_publish_interval_ms`, `pixel_format`, fixed dimensions, and `steering_snapshot`. STM-ART-002 is resolved by freezing the board-side setup surface around `assistant_tcp.host`, `assistant_tcp.port`, `steering_media_enabled`, `steering_media_port`, and `steering_media_publish_interval_ms`, and by adding matching task coverage for board-side setup and host workflow updates. No additional blocking docs-first gaps were found in the declared review scope.
